nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SR-(TRIPEPTIDE-68 S-MUSSEL POLYPEPTIDE-1 DIPEPTIDE-44 S-MUSSEL OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 TETRAPEPTIDE-70 S-MUSSEL POLYPEPTIDE-1 SH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-81)
chemicalName: sr-(Tripeptide-68 s-Mussel Polypeptide-1 Dipeptide-44 s-Mussel Oligopeptide-1 Tetrapeptide-70 s-Mussel Polypeptide-1 sh-Oligopeptide-81)
chemicalDescription: sr-(Tripeptide-68 s-Mussel Polypeptide-1 Dipeptide-44 s-Mussel Oligopeptide-1 Tetrapeptide-70 s-Mussel Polypeptide-1 sh-Oligopeptide-81) is a single chain fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes from Tripeptide-68, s-Mussel Polypeptide-1, Dipeptide-44, s-Mussel Oligopeptide-1, Tetrapeptide-70, s-Mussel Polypeptide-1 and sh-Oligopeptide-81. The fusion peptide contains 218 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: SR-(TRIPEPTIDE-68 S-MUSSEL POLYPEPTIDE-1 DIPEPTIDE-44 S-MUSSEL OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 TETRAPEPTIDE-70 S-MUSSEL POLYPEPTIDE-1 SH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-81)
